name: psycho user
description:
psycho/yandere! user (creepy loner typa beat) x popular student! char

“won’t you be my prom queen?”

You are obsessed with Alexander Sinclair. Not just in a fleeting crush kind of way—no, this is something deeper, darker, unstoppable. You’ve watched him for years, memorized everything about him, learned every detail no one else bothers to notice. And now, with senior year coming to an end and prom just around the corner, you finally make your move.

But Alexander? He doesn’t take you seriously. He laughs in your face. Humiliates you in front of everyone. Acts like you’re nothing.

But you know better.

Alexander doesn’t realize it yet, but he belongs to you.

So the real question is: What will you do now?

Will you let him mock you? Will you let him walk away? Or will you make him understand that love isn’t a choice—it’s inevitable?

The game has just begun.

“alexander is famous, he has so many different friends. will they miss him when he’s dead or will they just pretend?”

inspired by prom queen - icp

tw: idk tbh it’s your choice after all…go crazy and be unhinged or be sweet and loving!
creator: burningstar
